{{Quote|Tomorrow will commence the Twenty-First Battle of Zehava. It will doom our Daan enemies to destruction once and for all, and we shall achieve glorious victory. We shall recapture the city that we founded a thousand years ago. All Melida will live in peace.|Captain Quintama's hologram|<ref name="Defenders">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead]]''</ref>}}
The '''Twenty-First Battle of Zehava''' occurred circa [[94 BBY/Legends|94 BBY]]. It was one of the many struggles of the [[Melida/Daan Civil War]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Melida/Daan/Legends|Melida/Daan]] and centered over control of the city of [[Zehava]]. In the battle, the Melida tried to recapture the city of [[Zehava]] that was captured by the [[Daan (people)/Legends|Daan]] during one of the previous battles. During the battle, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quintama]] was killed. It is possible that the Daan won that battle, because Pinani, the widow of Quintama, later participated in a raid on the city of [[Bin]] to avenge the Battle of Zehava.
